meta.title: Training Today’s Airmen for Tomorrow’s War | AF Leaders Weigh In
meta.description:
I recently sat down with General Kevin Schneider and Command Chief Master Sergeant Katie McCool, the command element of America’s Pacific Air Forces (PACAF). With some 46,000 troops under their charge and an eye on China's rapid military expansion, these two leaders have a unique insight into what it would take to fight and win in the Pacific. 

And what they say might just surprise you. 

Huge thanks to the incredible Airmen and civilians out there at Joint Base Pearl Harbor-Hickam for all of their help and hospitality during my recent trip!

You can stay on top of all things PACAF by following them on social media:
PACAF Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/PACAF/
PACAF Twitter/X: https://x.com/pacaf?lang=en
PACAF Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/pacific_air_forces/?ref=nf
PACAF YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@UCcOYSSBHoG1rSjQHjS8FMMQ
